name: Quinoa Loaf
recipeIngredient: 3/16 cup Finely diced red bell pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the quinoa in a medium saucepan with 1 cup of water and 3/16 teaspoon sea salt. Bring to a simmer and cook, covered, until all the water has evaporated (about 15 minutes). Set aside.
2. Heat the olive oil in a medium saucepan. Saute the celery, fennel, onions, garlic, bell pepper, and salt for about 5 minutes. Stir occasionally to prevent burning.
3. Add the cooked quinoa, sesame seeds, pinto beans, and tahini to the sauteed vegetables. Blend until well combined.
4. Mix the whole wheat flour into the vegetable and quinoa mixture.
5. Line a large loaf pan with a baking sheet liner or lightly oil and flour the pan. Press the mixture into the pan.
6. Bake at 400°F for about 45 minutes, or until the loaf reaches an internal temperature of 180-200°F. Let the loaf cool, inverted, for 10 minutes before removing it from the pan. Serve in slices with your favorite tomato (or other) sauce if desired.
